titleStmt.title: SII 16.293: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 293. (A.R. No. 178 of 1913.) BUKKAPAṬṆAM, PENUKONDA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the rock below the dhvajastaṁbha in the Chauḍēśvarī temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1503, Vṛisha, Bhādrapada ba. 12, Sunday regularly corresponding to 1518 A.D., September 24.

It records that Daḷavāyi Veṅkaṭa-nāyaka, under orders of Mēgōṭi Timmānāyaka, the agent and minister of the king, remitted the taxes nagari-birāḍa, āsivechchālu etc., due on the lands owned at Bukkasāgaram and Anantapuram by the temple of Chavuḍēśvari of Krottacheruvu-Bukkasāgaram.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śatavaruṣaṁbulu 1503
gunaṭi vṛṣasaṁvatsara bhādrapada ba 12 bhā
nuvāsara puṁṇyakālamaṁdunu śrīmaṁn
mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapra
tāpa śrīvīra śrīraṁggarāyadēvamahārāyalayya
vāri kā¨ryaka¨rtulayina pradhāni mēgōṭi tiṁmmanā
yanigāri Ānatini daḷavāyi veṁkaṭapasāyanigāru
krottaceruU bukasāgaraṁ caUḍēśvaridēvaraku kaligina mā
nyapu maḍi bukasāgarāna maḍi ¿4Ø Ānaṁtapurānu ma
ḍi ¿2 Ubhayaṁ Āru duṁ yirusu maḍikiṁnni nagaribi
rāḍaṁ Āsivecālu sahā biruduluṁnu sa¨rvamānyaṁgā
nu rāyalavāriki puṇyaṁgānu maṁniṁstimi ganaka
yī dha¨rmāniki yevvaru ganaka tapinānu tama
mātāpitrulanu vāraṇāsilōnu
vadhiṁcina dōṣāna pōduru A
ni yiccina sa¨rvamānyapu silā
śāsanaṁ

svadattā dviguṇaṁpuṇyaṁ
paradattānu pālanaṁ .
paradattāpahārēṇa
svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ
bha vēt .
Digital edition of SII 16.293 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
